hero.title: Pick the plan that accelerates your career
hero.description: Two ways to boost your visibility on 'BallersHub. Start free and, when you're ready, add Pro to unlock the pro template, metrics, reviews and much more.

valueGrid.title: Everything you need to professionalize your game
valueGrid.validationDesc: Every profile goes through an identity and career-history check by our team.
valueGrid.metricsDesc: Views, contacts and reviews measured in real time so you understand your impact.
valueGrid.communityDesc: Clubs, agents and coaching staff already using 'BallersHub to discover talent.
valueGrid.setupDesc: Ready-made templates and guided onboarding: your first profile is built in minutes.

faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.q1: Can I try before I pay?
faq.a1: Yes. All paid plans include a 14-day no-commitment trial and you can cancel anytime from your dashboard.
faq.a2: Our team verifies identity, career history and references before showing the validated-profile badge. The process usually takes 24–72 hours.
faq.a3: You can upgrade or downgrade whenever you want. Differences are prorated automatically on your next billing cycle.
faq.q4: Is there a plan for clubs with multiple users?
faq.a4: The Elite Scouting plan includes staff seats. If your organization needs a custom setup, write to us and we'll put together a proposal.

cta.title: Let's talk about your project
cta.description: For clubs, federations and agencies we build custom proposals with account volume, integrations and dedicated support.

meta.title: Plans & pricing
meta.description: Pick the plan that boosts your career or agency. Free includes a verified profile and public URL. Pro adds an extended gallery, press, advanced SEO and JSON-LD schema.
meta.ogDescription: Free vs Pro for players and agencies. Annual subscription with a 7-day trial on Pro.
